case_title: NANCY HWANG VS. GLOBE EATS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HWANG, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBE EATS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2011 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) SERVED NOV-08-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBE EATS INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(AMENDED)* (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED NOV-08-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBE EATS INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY HWANG, NANCY GLOBE EATS INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GLOBE EATS INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HWANG, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOBE EATS INC. $3,636.60 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,746.60, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH MEAL BREAKS,PER CAL.LABOR CODE 512(A)AND AWARDS $1190.40 PER LABOR CODE 226.7. IN ADDITION, THE COURTS FINDS DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH REST BREAKS PER THE IWC WAGE ORDERS AND AWARD $1190.40 PER LABOR CODE 226.7 IN ACCORDANCE WITH U.P.S. V SUPERIOR COURT (2011).FINALLY IN CONNECTIONS WITH THE MEAL BREAK & REST BREAK CLAIMS, WAITING TIME PENALTIES OF $1255.80 ARE AWARDED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN THE REMAINDER OF HER CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT GLOBE EATS INC. MAILED TO RESPONDENT HWANG, NANCY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-01-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY GLOBE EATS INC. HWANG, NANCY
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2012 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK- JULIE RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED, DEPT. 525.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HWANG, NANCY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT GLOBE EATS INC. $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $510.00, PRINCIPAL BREAKDOWN,($300 IN LABOR CODE 226.7 DAMAGES AND $100 FOR WAITING FOR DAMAGES.) PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HER BURDEN ON HER TIP CLAIM, AS SHE WAS PAID ON INFORMATION SHE PROVIDED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM OF WORKSHIFT HOURS IS NOT SUPPORTED BY HER PAYROLL RECORDS. PLAINTIFF WAS ENTITLED TO REST PERIODS A MAXIMUM OF 59 SHIFTS. BASED ON STATEMENTS OF BOTH PARTIES, PLAINTIFF TOOK A MAJORITY OF REST BREAKS AND ALL MEAL BREAKS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF APR-02-2012
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:32am

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on the record, dept 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Globe Eats Inc.,represented by the owners appear pro per. Respondent, Nancy Hwang appears pro per. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHRA:(group 1) Daily Employee Job Summary; pay check stubs for Nancy Hwang; Hearsay statments; Defendant's Summary; Nancy's Claims.

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-03-2012 Judgment Entered
